analysis.summary: A chopped-and-screwed anthem celebrating slow-motion summer confidence and high-class style, where the 'drip' is defined by glowing skin, luxury fits, and a cool detachment from thirsty admirers.

keywords.imageryPrompt: Golden hour sunlight filtering through palm fronds, illuminating glowing skin and shimmering fabric textures.
Close up of a high-end gold chain resting on smooth denim shorts with intricate stitching details visible in macro shot.
Time-lapse effect showing dust motes floating lazily in shafts of light, capturing a suspended moment of stillness.
Subtle orange and red ember glow reflecting off dark skin against the backdrop of cool blue twilight shadows.
Silhouettes of wide-eyed figures reaching out towards a central figure who stands still and unbothered in golden light.
Deep indigo night sky with street lamps casting long, dramatic shadows on wet pavement reflecting neon signs.

styleHint: Chopped & screwed dirty south rap, hard booming bass, slow syrupy tempo, heavy sub-bass, dark southern trap drums, trunk-rattling kick, rattling hi-hats, chopped vocal ad-libs, slowed hook, deep pitched-down backing vocals, multiple male rappers with different southern twangs and flows, one melodic raspy hook vocalist, gritty but playful tech-rap energy, luxury computer hardware flex anthem, funny but not cheesy, clean lyrics, no profanity, no explicit metaphors, no artist names, no copycat vocals. Crew cypher about exotic computer parts, expensive GPUs, CPUs, RAM, motherboards, Linux kernels, Windows frustration, arrogant Apple user, booming car-speaker mix, late-night computer lab atmosphere. Aim for 4:20. Do not rush. Slow chopped-and-screwed pacing, extended hook tails, repeated ad-libs, stretched pauses between verses, and a slow fade outro.
